description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a predominantly white and black color scheme. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection of the body, featuring dark panels that may indicate solar cells or aerodynamic surfaces. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a large, dark-tinted canopy that provides wide visibility. Two engine nacelles are mounted on either side of the fuselage, positioned just below the wings, suggesting a design optimized for urban air mobility. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers, giving it a minimalist, futuristic appearance. The landing gear appears to be a simple tricycle configuration, with two main gear legs and a single nose wheel visible beneath the fuselage.
description: A futuristic, white and black airplane with a streamlined body, mid-mounted straight wings, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Twin side-mounted engines and a compact tail complete its modern urban air mobility design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, straight wings, the forward cockpit canopy, and the twin engine nacelles flanking the fuselage.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the smooth, aerodynamic fuselage, the large cockpit canopy, and the engine nacelle on the visible side.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the compact tail with a single vertical stabilizer and the full span of the straight wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view mirrors view 1, showing the other engine nacelle and the continuation of the sleek design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin electric engines mounted on the sides of the fuselage below the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with no visible horizontal stabilizers, resembling a minimalist conventional tail.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear legs and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, dark-tinted canopy, likely single or dual seat.
